problem: CLI has no library commands. Need to add 'hlx library list|show|comments list|comments post' commands with item resolution, section targeting, and SKILL.md documentation for agent discoverability.

files.why: Main command dispatcher with switch statement at lines 72-124. Add 'library' case following the same pattern as 'comments' (line 87-91) or 'tickets' (line 97-101): configOrHelp + call router.
Existing command module router pattern (52 lines): imports subcommands, dispatches via switch on args[0]. Library module router follows this exact pattern with list/show/comments subcommands.
Existing comment list pattern: hxFetch with /api basePath, client-side filtering, line-by-line output formatting. Reference for library comments list.
Existing comment post pattern: extract positional args as message, POST request with body. Reference for library comments post (adds --section and --rating flags).
hxFetch HTTP client: auth via X-API-Key or Bearer, retry with backoff, basePath option. All library commands use hxFetch with basePath: '/api'.
Flag parsing utilities: getFlag, hasFlag, getPositionalArgs, isHelpRequested, requireFlag. Library commands use --section, --rating flags and positional ref args.

Ticket resolution pattern (128 lines): extractTicketRef extracts from --ticket/env/positional, matchTicket resolves via id/shortId/number. Library item resolution adapts this for cuid/shortId/title match strategies.
Agent discoverability documentation. Available Commands table at lines 32-50. Add library commands section for agent awareness of new CLI capabilities.
Table output formatting pattern: padEnd-based column alignment. Reference for library list output.
Build: 'tsc'. TypeScript strict mode, ES2022 target. No new dependencies needed.
Compilation config: strict mode, outDir dist, rootDir src, declaration true. New library module must follow same conventions.

facts: Main dispatcher uses switch statement with configOrHelp pattern for auth-required commands (src/index.ts:72-124).
Comments module follows router pattern: index.ts dispatches to subcommand functions, each accepts (config, resolvedId, args).
Ticket resolution supports 3 strategies: exact ID, exact shortId (case-insensitive), numeric suffix match. Library item resolution needs: cuid, ticket shortId, title match.
hxFetch uses basePath option — /api/inspect default, /api for comment routes. Library routes will use basePath: '/api'.
Flag parsing via getFlag/hasFlag/getPositionalArgs/requireFlag functions in src/lib/flags.ts.
SKILL.md has structured format with Available Commands table. Library section must follow same table format.
No existing library code in the CLI. No 'library' case in the command dispatcher.
Output formatting uses padEnd for column alignment and simple console.log for lists.
Build is TypeScript only ('tsc'), no bundler. .js extension required in imports.
